info.name: ToMo API (Complete)
info.description:
# ToMo Backend — Complete API Collection

Import this file **and** an environment file (`ToMo-Local` or `ToMo-Production`) from the same `postman/` folder.

## Quick start

### User flow
1. **Send OTP** → **Verify OTP** (tokens auto-saved)
2. **Update Profile** → sets `isProfileCompleted`
3. **Upload Verification Images (3–5)** → **Admin Approve** → `isProfileVerified`
4. **Create Activity** → lifecycle endpoints

### Admin flow
1. **Register** (once) → **Login** (tokens auto-saved)
2. **List Users** (auto-saves `userId` + `verificationId`)
3. **Approve/Reject Verification**

## Variables (auto-managed)
| Variable | Set by |
|----------|--------|
| `userAccessToken` / `userRefreshToken` | Verify OTP, Refresh Token |
| `adminAccessToken` / `adminRefreshToken` | Admin Login, Refresh Token |
| `userId` | List Users, Get Me |
| `verificationId` | List Users, Get Verification Status |
| `activityId` | Create Activity |
| `activityStartTime` / `activityEndTime` | Pre-request on create/update activity |

## Dev OTP
Default: `{{devOtp}}` = `000000`

## Response shape
**Success:** `{ "success": true, ...data }`
**Error:** `{ "success": false, "message": "..." }`

item.name: health
item.description: Public health check — no authentication required.

request.description:
## GET /health

**Auth:** None

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": "ok",
  "timestamp": "...",
  "database": "connected"
}
```

item.name: user
item.description: User APIs under `/api/user`. Most routes require Bearer `{{userAccessToken}}`.

item.name: auth
item.description: OTP login and JWT session management.

request.description:
## POST /api/user/auth/send-otp

**Auth:** None

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `mobile` | Yes | 10-digit Indian mobile, starts 6–9 (`^[6-9]\d{9}$`) |
| `action` | Yes | `LOGIN` only |

### Errors
- `400` — validation failed
- `403` — user is blocked

## POST /api/user/auth/verify-otp

**Auth:** None

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `mobile` | Yes | Valid 10-digit Indian mobile |
| `otp` | Yes | Exactly 6 digits |
| `action` | Yes | `LOGIN` |

### Response
Returns `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, and `user`: `{ uid, isBlocked, isProfileCompleted, isProfileVerified }`

Tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.

## POST /api/user/auth/refresh-token

**Auth:** None

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `refreshToken` | Yes | Non-empty string |

Returns new `accessToken`. Does not rotate refresh token.

## POST /api/user/auth/logout

**Auth:** None

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `refreshToken` | Yes | Non-empty string |

Invalidates the refresh token.

## GET /api/user/auth/me

**Auth:** Bearer `userAccessToken`

Returns full user profile including `fullNameUpdatedAt`, `dateOfBirthUpdatedAt`.

item.name: auth — validation examples
item.description: Negative test cases for auth validation. Expect `400` with `success: false`.

item.name: profile
item.description: User profile read and update. Mobile cannot be changed by user.

request.description:
## GET /api/user/profile

**Auth:** Bearer

Returns user with cooldown timestamps for verified profile UI.

## PATCH /api/user/profile

**Auth:** Bearer

### Body validation (at least one field required)
| Field | Rules |
|-------|-------|
| `fullName` | 1–100 chars |
| `gender` | `MALE` \| `FEMALE` \| `OTHER` \| `PREFER_NOT_TO_SAY` |
| `dateOfBirth` | `YYYY-MM-DD`, not in future |
| `bio` | Max 500 chars |
| `profileImage` | JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 5MB (multipart only) |
| `mobile` | **Not allowed** — returns 400 |

### Verified user rules
- `gender` locked after verification
- `fullName` & `dateOfBirth` — 14-day cooldown each
- `bio` & `profileImage` always allowed
Same as JSON update but supports `profileImage` file upload via multipart/form-data.

## POST /api/user/verification

**Auth:** Bearer

### Body (multipart)
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `verificationImages` | Yes | 3–5 files, same field name repeated. JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 5MB each |

Creates `PENDING` submission. Blocked if already `PENDING` or `APPROVED`.

**Postman:** Select 3–5 image files for the `verificationImages` fields.

## GET /api/user/verification

**Auth:** Bearer

Returns latest submission with `images[]`: `status` = `PENDING` | `APPROVED` | `REJECTED`. `remark` shown when rejected.
Expect 400 — minimum 3 images required.

item.name: activities
item.description: Location-based activities. **Verified profile required** for create only. Any logged-in user can browse discovery.

request.description:
## GET /api/user/activities

**Auth:** Bearer (any logged-in user, verified not required)

Returns `PUBLISHED` activities only.

### Query params
| Param | Rules |
|-------|-------|
| `page` | ≥ 1 |
| `limit` | 1–50 |
| `category` | Valid ActivityCategory |
| `size` | `single` or `group` |
| `city` | String |
| `latitude`+`longitude`+`radiusKm` | All three required together |

## GET /api/user/activities/mine/hosted

**Auth:** Bearer

All activities created by host including `DELETED`.

## GET /api/user/activities/mine/joined

**Auth:** Bearer

Activities user joined (pending/approved). Includes `CANCELLED`, `EXPIRED`, `ACTIVE`, `COMPLETED`.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Coffee after work",
  "description": "Quick coffee near office. Casual chat welcome.",
  "category": "COFFEE",
  "locationName": "Blue Tokai Saket",
  "address": "Select Citywalk, Saket",
  "city": "Delhi",
  "latitude": 28.5244,
  "longitude": 77.2066,
  "startTime": "{{activityStartTime}}",
  "endTime": "{{activityEndTime}}",
  "maxParticipants": 4
}

request.description:
## POST /api/user/activities

**Auth:** Bearer (verified profile)

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `title` | Yes | 5–100 chars |
| `description` | Yes | 10–1000 chars |
| `category` | Yes | See categories below |
| `locationName` | Yes | Max 200 chars |
| `address` | No | Max 500 chars |
| `city` | No | Max 100 chars |
| `latitude` | Yes | -90 to 90 |
| `longitude` | Yes | -180 to 180 |
| `startTime` | Yes | ISO datetime, 30min–24h from now |
| `endTime` | Yes | After startTime, duration 30min–8h |
| `maxParticipants` | Yes | 2 (single) or 3–20 (group) |

**Categories:** COFFEE, WALKING, SPORTS, GYM, STUDY, COWORKING, DINING, TRAVEL, ENTERTAINMENT, OTHER

Host cannot overlap another hosted PUBLISHED/ACTIVE activity (409). Times auto-set in pre-request script (45min from now, 1h duration).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "1-on-1 coffee chat",
  "description": "Looking for one person to grab coffee nearby.",
  "category": "COFFEE",
  "locationName": "Blue Tokai Saket",
  "address": "Select Citywalk, Saket",
  "city": "Delhi",
  "latitude": 28.5244,
  "longitude": 77.2066,
  "startTime": "{{activityStartTime}}",
  "endTime": "{{activityEndTime}}",
  "maxParticipants": 2
}

request.description: Same as group create but `maxParticipants: 2` for single/1-on-1 activities.

## GET /api/user/activities/:id

**Auth:** Bearer

Returns `activity` + `myParticipation`. Visibility: `PUBLISHED` (anyone), `DELETED` (host only), `CANCELLED`/`EXPIRED`/`ACTIVE`/`COMPLETED` (host + participants).

## POST /api/user/activities/:id/join

**Auth:** Bearer (verified user)

Activity must be PUBLISHED, not full, not ended. Joiner cannot already be APPROVED for another overlapping PUBLISHED/ACTIVE activity (409). Use a second verified user token (not the host).
Withdraw own PENDING join request.
Host only. Auto-saves first pending userId to joinerUserId.
Host approves PENDING joiner. Set joinerUserId from List Participants. Fails with 409 if joiner is already APPROVED for another overlapping PUBLISHED/ACTIVE activity.
Host rejects PENDING joiner.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Coffee after work (updated)",
  "description": "Quick coffee near office. Casual chat welcome.",
  "category": "COFFEE",
  "locationName": "Blue Tokai Saket",
  "address": "Select Citywalk, Saket",
  "city": "Delhi",
  "latitude": 28.5244,
  "longitude": 77.2066,
  "startTime": "{{activityStartTime}}",
  "endTime": "{{activityEndTime}}",
  "maxParticipants": 4
}

request.description:
## PATCH /api/user/activities/:id

**Auth:** Bearer (host)

**When:** `PUBLISHED` + no pending/approved joiners (non-host)

Same body validation as create. All fields required.

## DELETE /api/user/activities/:id

**Auth:** Bearer (host)

**When:** `PUBLISHED` + no joiners → `DELETED` (visible to host only)

## POST /api/user/activities/:id/cancel

**Auth:** Bearer (host)

**When:** `PUBLISHED` + has pending/approved joiners → `CANCELLED`

## POST /api/user/activities/:id/start

**Auth:** Bearer (host)

**When:** `PUBLISHED` → `ACTIVE` (manual). Cannot start after endTime.

## POST /api/user/activities/:id/complete

**Auth:** Bearer (host)

**When:** `ACTIVE` → `COMPLETED` (manual). No cancel/edit during ACTIVE.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Hi",
  "description": "Quick coffee near office. Casual chat welcome.",
  "category": "COFFEE",
  "locationName": "Blue Tokai Saket",
  "latitude": 28.5244,
  "longitude": 77.2066,
  "startTime": "{{activityStartTime}}",
  "endTime": "{{activityEndTime}}",
  "maxParticipants": 4
}

{
  "title": "Coffee after work",
  "description": "Quick coffee near office. Casual chat welcome.",
  "category": "COFFEE",
  "locationName": "Blue Tokai Saket",
  "latitude": 28.5244,
  "longitude": 77.2066,
  "startTime": "{{activityStartTime}}",
  "endTime": "{{activityEndTime}}",
  "maxParticipants": 4
}

request.description: Run before admin approves verification. Expect 403.

item.name: admin
item.description: Admin APIs under `/api/admin`. Protected routes use Bearer `{{adminAccessToken}}`.

request.description:
## POST /api/admin/register

**Auth:** None

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `email` | Yes | Valid email format |
| `password` | Yes | 8–128 chars |
| `fullName` | Yes | 1–100 chars |

## POST /api/admin/login

**Auth:** None

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `email` | Yes | Valid email |
| `password` | Yes | Non-empty string |

## GET /api/admin/users

**Auth:** Admin Bearer

Auto-saves first user's `userId` and `verificationId` (if pending).

## PATCH /api/admin/users/:userId/block

**Auth:** Admin Bearer

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `isBlocked` | Yes | Boolean |

Revokes refresh tokens when blocking.

## PATCH /api/admin/users/:userId/profile

**Auth:** Admin Bearer

### Updatable fields (at least one required)
`mobile`, `fullName`, `gender`, `dateOfBirth`, `bio`, `isProfileCompleted`, `isProfileVerified`, `profileImage`

Admin has no cooldown restrictions. Can change mobile.

query.description: Optional: PUBLISHED | DELETED | CANCELLED | ACTIVE | COMPLETED | EXPIRED

request.description:
## GET /api/admin/activities

**Auth:** Admin Bearer

Returns all activities (all statuses) when `status` is omitted. Enable `status` query param to filter.

Each activity includes `activityCode`, `approvedCount`, `pendingCount`, and `spotsLeft`.

item.name: verification
item.description: Admin review of verification image submissions.

request.description:
## PATCH /api/admin/verifications/:verificationId

**Auth:** Admin Bearer

### Body validation
| Field | Required | Rules |
|-------|----------|-------|
| `status` | Yes | `APPROVED` or `REJECTED` |
| `remark` | If REJECTED | Non-empty, max 500 chars |

Sets user `isProfileVerified: true` on approve.
`remark` is **required** when status is `REJECTED`.
